purpose: Coffee field-value hints scraped from public coffee retailer collection/product metadata for OCR-to-field inference.

language_metadata.retailer_country: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the retailer/storefront when clear; 'MULTI' for multi-market/global sources.
language_metadata.retailer_language: Primary public storefront/feed language used for the scraped values, as a BCP-47-ish short tag.
language_metadata.scraped_value_languages: Languages actually present in scraped filter/product values. Mixed-language shops include multiple tags.
language_metadata.confidence: high when directly inferred from storefront locale/content; medium when page/feed is mixed or partially inferred.
language_metadata.note: Short reason for mixed-language or inferred cases.

metadata_schema.usage: For fuzzy/OCR matching, prefer *_aggregate_hints by target locale and use each source.language.scraped_value_languages to avoid cross-language overmatching. Source entries preserve retailer wording.
